hero.hero_overview: Fanny is one of the most mechanically challenging heroes in Mobile Legends. She excels at high-speed movement and burst damage, making her deadly in the hands of skilled players.
hero.hero_strength:
Insane mobility (fastest hero in map rotation)

High burst damage (can one-shot squishies)

Strong early game pressure

Hard to catch if played well
hero.hero_weakness:
Very hard to learn (needs strong mechanics)

Energy-dependent (not mana)

Weak if buff is stolen (especially blue buff)

Easily countered by crowd control (stun, knock-up)

data.title: How to use fanny

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Tigreal's ulti helps a lot to finished up squishy hero like mm or mage.

counters.counter_desc: One shot saber is very dangerous for late game fanny

dominants.dominant_desc: practice using her steel cables efficiently by aiming at walls to move faster and avoid wasting energy. Always secure the blue buff early, as Fanny depends heavily on energy to keep attacking and moving. Focus on targeting low-health backline heroes like marksmen and mages, and avoid engaging when enemy crowd control skills are available. Use quick in-and-out combos to finish enemies and escape safely, and constantly watch the map to plan your movement paths. With proper timing, energy management, and positioning, Fanny can dominate the game as a deadly finisher.

emblems.emblem_desc: Fanny benefits greatly from a custom Assassin Emblem setup with Rapture, Seasoned Hunter, and Lethal Ignition in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang because it maximizes her jungle efficiency and burst potential. Rapture provides additional physical penetration, allowing Fanny to deal higher damage even against slightly tanky targets. Seasoned Hunter boosts her damage to jungle monsters and objectives like Turtle and Lord, helping her farm faster and secure objectives more reliably—crucial for maintaining energy through blue buff. Meanwhile, Lethal Ignition adds an extra burst of damage after consecutive hits, perfectly complementing her cable combo playstyle to quickly finish off enemies. This setup makes her more effective in both early-game farming and late-game assassinations.

equips.equip_desc: This build is very effective for finished off the low hp heros like marksman and mages. Its one shot at middle of the game.

hero.hero_overview:
Fanny is a high-skill Assassin in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, known for her incredible mobility using steel cables that let her fly across the battlefield. Once a determined soldier from the Moniyan Empire who trained relentlessly to protect her homeland, Fanny developed her unique combat style to strike enemies with unmatched speed and precision. As a jungler, she excels at fast farming routes—typically starting from the blue buff to sustain her energy, then quickly clearing nearby camps and rotating to secure kills or objectives.
With an aggressive, high-risk gameplay style, Fanny thrives as a finisher who dives into the backline to eliminate low-health enemies instantly. Her burst damage combined with precise cable control allows skilled players to snowball early and dominate the map. However, mastering her energy management and execution is crucial, as a single mistake can leave her vulnerable to crowd control and quick elimination.
hero.hero_strength: Fanny excels as one of the most mobile and explosive assassins in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, with the ability to traverse the map at incredible speed using her steel cables. Her greatest strength lies in her high burst damage, allowing her to quickly eliminate squishy backline targets like marksmen and mages. Fanny also has exceptional snowball potential, meaning a strong early game can let her dominate the entire match. In skilled hands, she becomes extremely hard to catch or counter, making her a constant threat who can engage and disengage fights effortlessly.
hero.hero_weakness: Fanny has several significant weaknesses in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, mainly due to her high skill dependency and energy limitations. She relies heavily on precise cable control and proper energy management, meaning even a small mistake can leave her unable to escape or deal damage. Fanny is also extremely vulnerable to crowd control effects like stun or suppression, which can instantly shut her down. Additionally, she struggles if she falls behind early, as she depends on snowballing to stay effective, making her a risky pick for inexperienced players.

data.recommend: It's only for damage build jungler fanny role.

spell.spell_desc: Fanny requires Retribution as a jungler in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang because it significantly boosts her farming speed and overall efficiency in the early game. Since Fanny depends heavily on securing the blue buff to maintain her energy for continuous cable usage, Retribution helps her clear jungle camps faster and safely secure objectives like buffs, Turtle, and Lord. This spell also enhances her ability to snowball by allowing quicker rotations and level advantage, which is crucial for her aggressive playstyle as a finisher. Without Retribution, her jungle clear becomes slower and less reliable, making it harder for her to dominate the map.

hero.hero_overview:
Fanny is one of the hardest heroes to master in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang. She uses steel cables to swing across the map, making her one of the fastest and most mobile heroes in the game. Instead of using normal mana, she consumes Energy, which requires careful management.
She excels at quickly diving into the backline, eliminating squishy heroes (like Marksmen and Mages), and escaping before enemies can react.
hero.hero_strength:
Extreme Mobility
Can fly across walls using cables.
Rotates between lanes very quickly.
Hard to catch if played well.High Burst Damage
Can instantly eliminate low-defense heroes.
Deadly in early and mid game.
 Snowball Potential
If she gets early kills, she becomes very difficult to stop.
Can dominate inexperienced teams.
 Map Control
Can invade jungle easily.
Applies pressure everywhere due to fast movement.
hero.hero_weakness:
Very Hard to Master
Requires fast hands and precise cable control.
Beginners often struggle with energy management.
Energy Dependent
If she runs out of energy, she becomes almost useless.
Blue buff is very important for her.
Weak Against Crowd Control (CC)
Stuns, knock-ups, and suppression can instantly shut her down.
Heroes like tanks with heavy CC are dangerous for her.

spell.spell_desc:
Deals true damage to jungle monsters (and later enemy heroes when upgraded).
Helps secure buffs, Turtle, and Lord.
Required to buy jungle equipment.
After upgrading boots, it becomes one of these:
Flame Retribution Steals Physical/Magic Attack from enemy hero.
Ice Retribution Steals Movement Speed (great for chasing).
Bloody Retribution Deals damage and restores HP.
 For Fanny, Ice Retribution is usually best because it helps stick to targets while flying.

counters.counter_desc: This MF has those barrage of CC that makes it hard to aim and use fanny's 2nd skill. Any other heroes similar to Sora's CC is a counter. (Ex.: Akai & Khufra)

Another MF are these burst types. Due to fanny being squishy af, if enemy focuses on you and your team comp can't help you on enemy invading your jungle, it's best to just clear minion waves with your side laners (ONLY CLEAR MINION WAVES AFTER 5 MIN. MARK)

(Ex.: Kadita & Odette)

dominants.dominant_desc:
At lvl. 4, you & your teammates should find kills as much as you can. Take turtles immediately. Don't let the enemy contest neutral objectives. (Turtle/Lord)

(I know. This is more on team communication and synergy. But sadly, this is a 5 man team game.)

Push turrets ONLY when the turret shield is down. (It's a waste of precious time. You should focus on creeps/kills where you can get more gold.)

If your team is in the losing side, don't force contest neutral objectives.

Good luck. End it as fast as possible. Watch for enemies building Winter Crown, Immortality & Wind of Nature.

Try to bait those enemies to use their item's active skills.
Also try baiting enemy CC if you can and let your teammates know that the enemy CC skills are on cooldown. (Also ask for your teammates to tell you when enemy uses CC skills)

emblems.emblem_desc: If you are confident that you can burst enemies fast & end the game early.
As the name suggest, kill all jungle creeps fast. Check map and steal creeps from opponent jungler to gap them from gold & exp.
Yeah. If you want to get soaked in team fights, this is the emblem for you

equips.equip_desc: FULL PHY ATK
Standard. I mostly use this build.

hero.hero_overview:
I'll be straight to the point & no BS:

Just farm in the early game. Always check everyone's gold and items.

Invade if enemy team comp does not have that much CC.

Always check if the enemy side lane (gold/exp) is over extending. Ex.: An enemy is near your outer turret.

If they are over extending, try to punish them immediately after taking your purple buff. (You should ALMOST always start with purple buff.)

Depending on the enemy team comp, adjust your build accordingly.

Ex: Many CC (Tough Boots, Brute Force)
      Burst Magic DMG (Tough Boots, Athena's Shield)
      Burst Physical DMG (Warrior Boots, Antique Cuirass)

Building her Full Burst will make her squishy af. (Around 3.5k-4.5k HP.)

data.title: Fanny guide of someone with 3k matches with her.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: His hook and suppression ultimate can catch Fanny mid-air and kill her instantly.
His knock-up and suppression combo interrupts Fanny and isolates her.
His suppression ultimate pulls Fanny out of the air for an easy kill.
His instant burst and airborne suppression can delete Fanny before she escapes.
Her multiple crowd-control skills punish Fanny when she dives in.
His ultimate disables dash skills, making Fanny unable to use her cables.

counters.counter_desc: His second skill blocks dashes, stopping Fanny's cables and trapping her.

dominants.dominant_desc: Secure Blue Buff first to maintain energy. Focus on fast jungle clear and invade enemy jungle when ahead. Use Steel Cable to rotate quickly and pick off isolated enemies. Avoid direct team fights early and target squishy heroes like marksmen and mages. Watch for crowd control skills and retreat immediately after a kill. Maintain map awareness and snowball the game before late game.

emblems.emblem_desc: Assassin Emblem with Killing Spree is the most reliable and commonly used setup for Fanny.
This emblem setup increases Fanny's lifesteal and survivability, allowing her to sustain in fights and recover HP while continuously engaging enemies.

equips.equip_desc: These items maximize Fanny's one-combo kill potential, letting her delete squishy heroes instantly.
This sustain build lets Fanny heal through fights, survive crowd control and burst damage, and stay longer in combat while still dealing enough damage to secure kills.

hero.hero_overview: Fanny is a high-risk, high-reward assassin who dominates the battlefield through unmatched mobility and burst damage. She requires mechanical skill, map awareness, and strong energy control—but in the right hands, she is one of the most terrifying heroes in Mobile Legends.
hero.hero_strength:
*Exceptional Mobility (Can move across the map faster than almost any hero)
 *High Burst Damage (Capable of eliminating squishy heroes in seconds)
 *Strong Snowball Potential (Dominates games when ahead)
*Outplay Potential (Rewards high skill and mastery)
hero.hero_weakness: Energy-Dependent, Very Squishy (depends on your build, emblem, and play style), High Difficulty and easily Countered by Crowd Control.

data.recommend: Very useful if you want to use or master Fanny. There may be lacking but this is all based on my experience on using Fanny.

spell.spell_desc: *Ice Retribution (essential for jungle control, energy sustain (Blue Buff), and securing kills.)

data.title: About Fanny

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Grock can block escape routes with his wall, allowing an aggressive Fanny to easily secure kills inside the area.
Hilda and Fanny can snowball the enemy jungle together, constantly invading and often trading fights in their favor.

counters.counter_desc: Hilda counters Fanny by invading her jungle early in the game and disrupting her farm.
Fredrinn is considered a direct counter to Fanny in the jungle due to his strong crowd control and high HP.
Ruby has instant crowd control and, with her skill combos, can lock Fanny down for a significant amount of time.
Khufra prevents all mobility abilities, fully disrupting Fanny's cables and halting her movement.

dominants.dominant_desc: Aggressively but cautiously. Fast ganks for easy kills and jungle farming.

emblems.emblem_desc:
In the present meta, Fanny utilizes the Fighter emblem set. This configuration enhances her survivability, enabling her to remain engaged in battles for extended periods. Consequently, we select these talents:
1) to accelerate jungle clearing,
2) to boost spell vamp,
3) to recover HP upon achieving a kill.

With this build, Fanny can almost always one-shot her enemies. However, due to the lack of defensive items, the hero becomes extremely fragile and will die quickly without a farm advantage. This build is focused on:
1) additional penetration,
2) increased damage to a single target,
3) HP recovery after securing a kill.

equips.equip_desc: Use this build to secure a win.
Use this build to secure a win.

hero.hero_overview: Fanny is one of the most skill-dependent yet meta jungle assassins in the current meta. Despite receiving multiple nerfs, she remains a strong jungle pick. Due to her unique mobility and damage mechanics, Fanny is extremely difficult to master and requires a high level of mechanical skill.
hero.hero_strength: Fanny offers high damage output, exceptional mobility, and strong pushing potential. She is one of the strongest heroes in the early game and can apply massive pressure across the map. Fanny has virtually no skill ceiling — the better you play her, the greater impact you can have on the game.
hero.hero_weakness: Like most assassins, Fanny is highly vulnerable to crowd control. Losing the purple buff greatly reduces her effectiveness and makes gameplay much harder. Additionally, she becomes weaker in the late game, which means matches should be finished as early as possible.

data.recommend: The best Fanny guide all time/

spell.spell_desc: Every jungler is required to pick Retribution.

data.title: Fanny

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
A Angela é a parceira ideal porque sua habilidade suprema fornece um escudo essencial que protege a Fanny ao mergulhar em torres ou no meio do time inimigo, compensando sua fragilidade natural.
Além da proteção, a Angela oferece cura e lentidão aos adversários, o que facilita para a Fanny conectar seus cabos e finalizar os alvos com precisão. Essa sinergia garante que a Fanny tenha muito mais liberdade para ser agressiva, tornando seus movimentos rápidos ainda mais letais e difíceis de serem interrompidos.

counters.counter_desc:
Os maiores counters da Fanny são heróis que possuem controle de grupo pesado ou mecânicas que interrompem sua movimentação, como Khufra, Minsitthar ou Franco. Esses personagens conseguem travar a Fanny no meio de um voo, anulando sua principal vantagem competitiva e deixando-a totalmente exposta para ser eliminada pelo time. Sem a sua mobilidade, ela perde a capacidade de escape e se torna um alvo extremamente fácil devido à sua baixa resistência física.
Outro ponto importante a mencionar é que heróis com alta defesa física ou itens de contra-ataque também dificultam seu desempenho. Quando os adversários conseguem sobreviver ao combo inicial de dano explosivo, a Fanny acaba ficando sem energia para continuar a luta, o que a obriga a recuar e ceder espaço no mapa.

dominants.dominant_desc:
A estratégia central consiste em dominar a selva através da limpeza veloz proporcionada pelo talento de Caçador Experiente, priorizando sempre a manutenção do bônus azul para sustentar as rotações constantes pelo mapa. Com a sua build de dano bruto, o objetivo é sufocar a economia do caçador inimigo e aplicar pressão nas rotas frágeis logo no início da partida.
Em termos de combate, a descrição deve enfatizar a importância de flanquear a retaguarda para ativar o combo de itens como a Lâmina dos Sete Mares e o Perfurador do Céu, garantindo execuções instantâneas. É fundamental alertar sobre o perigo de controles de grupo; a orientação deve ser esperar o gasto de habilidades de atordoamento inimigas antes de entrar na luta. Dessa forma, você utiliza sua mobilidade e letalidade para converter abates em objetivos estratégicos, como a Tartaruga e o Lorde, encerrando o jogo antes que os adversários consigam montar defesas sólidas.

emblems.emblem_desc:
A escolha desse conjunto de emblemas foca em maximizar o potencial de execução e a velocidade de selva, características fundamentais para uma Fanny agressiva. O uso do emblema principal de Assassino fornece a penetração física e o ataque necessários para derreter alvos frágeis logo no início do jogo. Complementando isso, o talento de "Ignição Letal" é a peça chave para garantir abates, pois aplica um dano adaptativo extra após atingir o inimigo três vezes, o que combina perfeitamente com o estilo de jogo de múltiplos cortes rápidos da Fanny.
Além do dano explosivo, a configuração inclui talentos que auxiliam na mobilidade e na economia de recursos. O primeiro talento foca em velocidade de movimento ou penetração, enquanto o segundo talento de "Caçador Experiente" (representado pelo ícone de monstro) aumenta significativamente o dano contra o Lorde, a Tartaruga e monstros da selva, garantindo que você consiga o bônus azul com rapidez e segurança. No geral, essa combinação permite que você domine o mapa através de uma limpeza de selva veloz e um combo de ataque que pune severamente qualquer adversário fora de posição.

equips.equip_desc: Esta configuração foi escolhida para transformar a Fanny em uma assassina de letalidade máxima, focando em penetração física e execução rápida. A combinação da Lâmina dos Sete Mares com o Perfurador do Céu garante que o primeiro impacto seja fatal contra heróis frágeis, enquanto o Rugido Maléfico e a Lâmina do Desespero asseguram que nem mesmo tanques sobrevivam ao seu dano bruto. Complementando a build, a Alabarda do Mar corta a cura inimiga e o Machado de Guerra oferece a resistência e a redução de recarga necessárias para sustentar lutas mais longas.

hero.hero_overview:
Fanny é uma das personagens mais icônicas e desafiadoras de Mobile Legends, destacando-se pela sua mecânica de movimentação única baseada em cabos de aço. Inspirada em conceitos de alta mobilidade, ela utiliza suas cordas para se lançar pelo mapa, atravessando paredes e ganhando uma velocidade que poucos heróis conseguem acompanhar. Essa característica a torna uma caçadora extremamente perigosa, capaz de entrar e sair de confrontos em questão de segundos, atingindo alvos frágeis na retaguarda inimiga com uma precisão devastadora.
O grande diferencial da Fanny reside na curva de aprendizado necessária para dominá-la, sendo amplamente considerada um dos heróis mais difíceis de todo o jogo. O sucesso com ela depende quase inteiramente da gestão de energia e do conhecimento geográfico do mapa, já que o uso excessivo de cabos sem atingir os inimigos pode deixá-la rapidamente sem recursos. Quando bem jogada, ela aplica uma pressão constante nas rotas, forçando os adversários a jogarem de forma defensiva devido ao seu potencial de abate instantâneo no início e meio da partida.
hero.hero_strength: A maior vantagem da Fanny é sua mobilidade absoluta, que permite atravessar o mapa e ignorar paredes mais rápido do que qualquer outro personagem. Isso garante a ela um poder de emboscada devastador e a capacidade de eliminar alvos frágeis antes mesmo que eles possam reagir. Além disso, seu dano explosivo no início do jogo impõe um medo constante nos adversários, permitindo que ela dite o ritmo da partida e escape de situações perigosas com facilidade graças aos seus cabos.
hero.hero_weakness: A principal desvantagem da Fanny é sua dependência extrema do bônus azul da selva, já que o consumo de energia de seus cabos é altíssimo e sem essa regeneração ela se torna praticamente inútil em combate. Outro ponto crítico é a sua curva de dificuldade, que exige centenas de partidas para ser dominada, tornando qualquer erro de cálculo no lançamento das cordas um erro fatal que a deixa vulnerável e sem fuga. Além disso, ela é extremamente sensível a controles de grupo, especialmente efeitos de supressão ou atordoamento, que interrompem seu voo e a transformam em um alvo fácil devido à sua baixa resistência física. Por fim, o desempenho da Fanny tende a cair drasticamente no final da partida, quando os adversários fecham itens de defesa e ela perde a capacidade de garantir abates rápidos.

data.recommend: Que ser o melhor jogador de fanny do ML? Então venha comigo;)

spell.spell_desc: O feitiço Caçar é essencial para quem joga na selva, pois permite causar dano real imediato em monstros, facilitando o ganho de ouro e experiência. Ele é a ferramenta principal para garantir objetivos estratégicos, como o Lorde e a Tartaruga, evitando que o time adversário os roube. Além disso, ao ser aprimorado, ele pode ser usado contra heróis inimigos para causar lentidão ou reduzir o dano sofrido, tornando-se uma peça chave tanto para a economia quanto para o combate direto.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Angela is very useful, especially in ranked games when there is an Angela and you are using Fanny, because Fanny needs to go back to base to secure kills.

spell.spell_desc: I chose Retribution as my battle spell because it helps the hero clear jungle monsters faster and gain buffs easily. It allows the hero to level up quickly and secure important objectives like the Turtle and Lord. Retribution should be used at the right timing when the monster HP is low to avoid wasting it. The upgraded Retribution can also be used on enemy heroes to slow them down or reduce their power, making it very useful for jungler heroes. 🎮🔥

hero.hero_overview: Fanny is a high-skill assassin known for aggressive rotations, fast jungle clears, and constant pressure. She dominates early game by rotating quickly to gank lanes and secure objectives.
hero.hero_strength: Fanny strength lies in her unmatched mobility high burst damage, and ability to dominate the early game through aggressive rotations
hero.hero_weakness: Fanny is difficult to master, relies heavily on energy and buffs, and is vulnerable to crowd control if she fails to snowball

spell.spell_desc: Fanny uses Steel Cables to swing and rotate across the map, dealing burst damage, and her ultimate finishes off enemies quickly. Energy management is crucial to maintain mobility and aggression
